name: Workflow Controller
description: Step-based workflow execution control with context optimization (facts, questions, plan). Wraps Pinecone as delegate when configured.

pineconeApiKey.label: Pinecone API Key
pineconeApiKey.help: Pinecone API key (or use ${PINECONE_API_KEY} env var). Leave empty to disable long-term memory (noop delegate).

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Unique identifier for this agent (used as Pinecone namespace prefix). Falls back to OPENCLAW_AGENT_ID env var.

compactAfterDays.label: Compact After Days
compactAfterDays.help: Days after which old turns are compacted into Pinecone
